author: @Rockgamer823
text:
Started playing 10 days ago because of the collab, I'll give my honest review as someone whose only other gacha game has been Blue Archive which I started playing for the same reason (collab with Toaru). 
I think Morimens excels in it's story and gameplay, the game's systems are complete and it's really fulfilling to play once you learn different mechanics from lots of characters. 
The bgm is good, not my favourite but fits the story to a glove, only thing I find a bit annoying is that so many of the bgms start the same way (specially the battle bgms), and when going into your home menu you can't use those bgms because it gets stale so quickly, but I guess that a problem with every gacha game.
If I had one serious criticism about this game is how it's hard to enjoy story and it's gameplay simultaneously, while playing the normal campaign of the game, I'd get so invested in the story but right after I'd have to do a 15 minute exploration to keep reading and that would break my inmers

text:
" You know the dandelion flower? The one that scatters its seeds on the wind?

The wind carries those fluffy seeds far, far from where they were born. What if one of them ends up in a desert where not even a single blade of grass is growing? If you can imagine how that lone seed will feel... then you might be able to understand me.

That seed is still a baby flower. If it does its best, it can turn even a desert into a garden.

Maybe that little seed will decide to thrive. Maybe it will decide to grow and multiply, so that it can turn the whole desert into a field of dandelions.

What do you think can give it the strength to do so?

All it needs... is to be loved by just one person in the whole desert. All it needs is to be told how pretty dandelions are."

- Saya

author: @juakored
text:
It's really good that they're giving people a free copy of her no matter what, but having to wait and go through so much content in order to get her or even know if she's gonna be worth the effort, just so that they can artificially keep player numbers up even so slightly for a bit longer is kinda shitty. 

Just think about it from a standard Gacha collab experience. 

- You've never played X game. 

- They make a Collab with Y which is more popular than X.

- You give players some shitty character for free (that's where this game is above average, but it's also not like there's many characters they could've given away with this Collab either).

- you give players some incentive to stay (250 pulls is what I've heard they're going with).

*now's where the issues begin.*

-  There's no banner yet... I don't think I've ever seen that before on any of the gachas I've played...

- you can't test the character beforehand to even see if she's gonna be worth staying for, if they did her justic

author: @SleepyGuppy
text:
Some things to note: Salvador isn't the father of all, more a priest of the father of all for that matter.

As for what you do with him in a team, most things are covered in the video like in the past few videos, so good, but there's quite a few more things that you would want to do with him.

1st, Birth of a Soul, a BP WoD that grants Max HP +10%, The Healing and Shield provided by the wielder increase by 10%, both of these effects "After playing the wielder's "Strike", restore 6% of lost HP. After playing the wielder's "Defense"' gain Shield equal to 6% of current life. This effect can trigger up to 1 time each per turn." which is perfect for any team with Salvador, so it's worth looking it up to if you are decided to use him in a team and have some cash to spare.

2nd and more budget, Horla (E1 at minimum), mainly in Grief stance "All Awakeners' Shield Generated, HP Recovery, and STR Reduction effect +21%. Increase the HP Recovery of Resplendent Chapters." so that you gain more Crim

author: @GunAndSwordGame
text:
Lại rơi rớt thông tin 😭Mình bổ sung ở đây nhá
1, Corrosions là hiệu ứng scale theo chỉ số STR của Saya, stack như một status bình thường. Khi được kích hoạt bằng đòn đánh hoặc xúc tu, nó sẽ tự tiêu thụ lượng stack tương đương với sát thương gây ra để gây x3 lượng dam kích hoạt đấy
Corrosions của Saya chỉ là một yếu tố bổ trợ, trong khi Castor mới là Carry Corrosion đích thực, nên Wheel/Trấn/Vũ khí của Saya mới tối ưu nhất khi đi cùng Castor
2, Nếu ai vẫn có điều kiện đầu tư, thì điểm dừng phù hợp là E1 hoặc E3 (2/4 copy), và không nên OE (8 copy để mở ulti 2) vì tích vòng ulti đầu đã sẵn mệt nghỉ rồi 🥵

author: @DarkCT
text:
Can't say im surprised this is the conclusion you came too. Clunky is what she is. a rouse that obscures your own cards assuming you even give up the resources to access it. Corrosion that despite the rarity of the mechanic it crosses into a discard draw function when many teams are hand sculpting. Divine caro editing the tone of her embryo gen and functionality, causing her potential tempo issues in her element. she reads niche at best, and if anything a flavorful but troublesome character to play. not a great basis for a collab on pure mechanics. her discard draw can't even remove your entire hand, so you can't use it to pitch away symptons or states even. 

it's a shame in my eyes. I constantly credit the dev team for the thematic nature of their collabs, but this was 3 for 3 of me being here for a character release and not being excited about the mechanics at play. she still has her uses, but it all comes with strings attached.

author: @kingflares2
text:
Was a bit slow on this, cause IRL issues. Funeral prep. etc. Can't stream that much now as I have to prepare a lot of shit. Never die without a will. 
I'll prob make a separate video on what its like preparing for a funeral. Normally the person who died, did all of this. Anyway in regards to Saya

"Fake" A/S tier. She's a very good unit with wheel, but once you strip that away from here, her teams comps before very niche compared to prev anni units. There are many supports that do what she does better. If it weren't for the divine Caro Drawback, I wouldn't mind. Plus, 90% of you after watching this are beating her black and blue for her wheel to put on your teams. I also did testing for memes on putting her wheels on other comps just for the arith. Every single comp. Kath, bluwill, gelot, etc. Can perform better with it. None of you are actually gonna use Saya with her wheel, be honest. 

That is why I said "fake" a/s tier. If you are using her with the wheel. She's A tier min. Her BiS

Услышишь ли ты мой зов, когда тень растает в пустоте?
Отзовёшься ли на зов, имя в бездне шепча, лишь тебе?
Слышишь ли этот зов — сквозь песок, что уходит сквозь пальцы,
пусть забыта — но я всё ещё здесь.

Одуванчика пух, в течении одинок — меня уносит поток, и некуда мне.
Крылья, снежной листвой, извиваясь во мгле, чертят звёздный узор в темноте.
Лепестки в вышине — всё, что держим в руке, — капля чистой, истинной любви,
лишь она даст семени рост.
Слёзы знают, и пух — в этом мире внизу одинокий поиск, но тот звук не отпустит,

Осколки тишины вдохни — и чистый звук треснет, голос сорвётся.
Старые сны, память дней — гнилой сладостью кровь стынет в жилах.
Эхо спорит с огнём, сквозь разломы и щели, круша и сжимая в тиски —
лишь забыть и отпустить… но я знаю: прочувствовать — значит понять.

Как упавший листок, что уходит в путь, растворяясь в серой мгле,
Тени тают следом, исчезая в дымке, сбившись с пути.

author: @divineclaypuppet7460
text:
20:23 Ok so to explain the Realms functions : 
- Chaos is mostly humans, but: they are the Researchers type, those that try to understand the world around them and all. Think of them as your protagonists in like Call of Cthulhu, where you're an investigator sometimes "blessed" or "cursed" by the Higher Beings (mostly cursed honestly). In Morimens, it's mostly people from Mythag University, the faction of the Protagonist. 
This Realm has Tawil, the incarnation of the God of Omniscience and Forbidden Knowledge from beyond the Gate of the Silver Key (inspired by Umr-at Tawil, an outer god who's an avatar of Yog-Sothoth)

- Aequor is the most recognisable "Cthulhu" faction: they are Lovecraftian people related to the water or the depths, coming from the Eternal Lemuria (Legally Distinct Rlyeh). 
This realm has Tulu, who's a twink with tentacles from his back who is obviously inspired by Cthulhu. He was the God-king of Lemuria.

- Caro is all the gothic, vampire, kinda body-transfiguration

author: @ICE.AMERICANO
text:
라방 못봐서 다시보기 보는데 스팀리뷰 ㅋㅋ

1. 머피 스킨

오히려 이격 캐릭하고 기존 캐릭 스킨을 공유하는 게임 자체가 극소수
만약 된다고 해도 머피랑 탄피가 동일 편성 못하게 막았을 것
그리고 이게 문제가 되려면 머피 스킨 출시 직후에

탄피가 나옴으로 인해서 머피를 못쓰게 됐거나 아예 상위호환으로 나와서 머피를 죽여버렸거나
머피가 병신이 되서 파티에 안들어가게 됐거나 뭐 이중에 하나라도 있어야함

2. 공식 번역가

그림쟁이니 영어로만 말하니 러시아어 구사자네 뭐네 하지만 공식 번역가라는 사람이 디코에서 한 말은
한국어로 자기소개 하는 거 말곤 본 적이 없음 애초에 그 글 말고는 디코에 작성한 글 이력조차 없음
디스코드 소개말도 한국어로 적어둠

뭐 실제로 공식 번역가가 한국인 같지 않은 건 사실임 번역하는 거 보면

3. human translate
단순하게 저 영어 뜻 그대로 읽으면 그냥 인간 번역이다 AI 번역 아니다 표시인데
저게 꼬울 이유가 뭐가 있는지 모르겠음 

일반적으로 번역에는 '자원봉사자 기여 이름'을 써둠. 누가 했는지, 어느 범위를 했는지 기록을 함.
근데 이 파트만 포멀하게 '담당한 사람의 이름이 적혀있지 않음' 인 시점에서 의심을 안할수가 없음.

라고 하는데 기존 봉사자의 이름을 제외하고 공식 번역가 이름으로 갈아치운 것도 아니고
그 사람과 봉사자의 내용이 섞여 있어서 여러 사람의 이름을 적으면 난잡해지니 저렇게 표시 하는 것도 이상하지 않음
차라리 그 번역을 자신이 해서 자신의 이름이 빠진 게 서운하다면 이해 가능

4. 여러가지 문제라고 하지만 사실상 번역 문제 밖에 없음

5. 솔직히 공식 번역가의 실력이 좋냐 하면 아닌 건 사실이고
망각전야를 하는 사람의 최소 반 이상은 번역에 불만이 있는 건 사실이기 때문에 번역 가지고 욕하는 건 이상하지 않음
근데 너무 억까를 섞어서 말함 

무언가를 전달하거나 의견을 제시할 때 가장 안 좋은 방법이
이런 식으로  억까와 사실도 아닌 내용을 섞어서 이야기 하면서 자신의 말을 설득하
video_title: 망각전야Morimens) (대리뽑,상담시청가능) 1주일 영상을 안올리는 유루바가있다????

author: @kingflares2
text: In case you were wondering how he died. It was a variety of factors that can happen to anyone. Its brain aneurysm combined with severe triple vessel coronary something. It is pretty wild. I'll make a vid with more permission from relatives. His life was actually interesting. But of all things. This was the calmest death I've seen. I've been to 3 funerals, had people die. Even friends back then who offed themselves. This was one was no blood, no fear on the face, just sleeping. Like you'd have 0 clue he was dead. We just found him, 1-2hours of eating Bun Bo Hue (I can't type viet sorry) dead. After lying down for a nap due to a headache. He was the most fit uncle. Probably the strongest person in my US family. He carried logs at the refugee camps and was in a Boat people doc (in the background, we totally famous). I know he was the strongest, cause he would beat me and my cousins when we were fooling around when we were younger. He'd 1v4 us.
